title: Greenpill Nigeria Water Cup Mapping
dek: Nigeria's strongest public proof point combines Water Cup updates, an onchain Hypercert, and an Awka Ethereum-at-10 showcase.
excerpt: A source-backed launch story for Greenpill Nigeria: Project Water Cup updates, a Water Cup Mapping Hypercert, and public event context from Awka.
body:
Greenpill Nigeria has one of the strongest public chapter footprints in the research artifact.

The Water Cup thread on the Regen Coordination Hub gives the program context. A public Hypercert records the Water Cup Mapping proof surface. A separate Awka Ethereum-at-10 event page shows the chapter presenting Water Cup alongside ReFi and public-goods education.

This story should render as a proof-backed field note, not as a claim that every downstream impact metric is already verified by the website.

## Sources

- S015: https://hub.regencoordination.xyz/t/greenpill-nigeria-project-water-cup-updates/307
- S046: https://app.hypercerts.org/hypercerts/42220-0x16bA53B74c234C870c61EFC04cD418B8f2865959-86091438830997431256233775680237357498368
- S017: https://luma.com/hlkglzcg
author: Greenpill Network research
